author: Sredder
text: Liverpool 2026/27 Season - Iraola Officially Confirmedabout an hour agoTattooedByAggerlikes thisReplyQuoteSelect PostDeselect PostLink to PostMemberGive GiftBack to TopPost by Sredder onabout an hour ago3 hours agorynnikelddisaid:Who would've thought that the existing players that we already have that cost over £200m to acquire are actually not that bad when being coached properly in a decent tactical set up?Looking forward to seeing Iraola finally unlocking their potential, when they've been forcefully trapped inside a prehistoric tactical straightjacket for too long.This proves that our players don't become crap overnight. There has to be a root cause for our horrendous season. That root cause is Slot and his coaching staff.We are going to see a totally different Liverpool next season.
